svg.text: Rolling buffer KV cache — W=4, slot = i mod 4
cache never grows beyond 4 slots — oldest entry gets overwritten when window moves
cache full — now overwrites oldest slot on each new token
cache stays at 4 slots forever — at step 1000 it still holds only 4 entries: t997, t998, t999, t1000
standard KV cache at step 1000 would hold 1000 entries — 250× more memory
